_usage: RF02 Version Lock template for RP04 ChemBERTa BBBP Linear Probe. Run rp04_chemberta.m to generate lock_snapshot.json with actual values in result/runs/<ts>/.
_note: This file defines the lock schema. Actual values are filled in by emk.setup.lockfile(snap, filePath) after each successful run.

paper.title: ChemBERTa: Large-Scale Self-Supervised Pretraining for Molecular Property Prediction

model.name: seyonec/ChemBERTa-zinc-base-v1
model.approach: frozen CLS embedding (768-dim) + StandardScaler + LogisticRegression (linear probe)

split.note: Paper uses scaffold split. This repro uses random split consistent with RP02/RP03.
